data.title: Perpetual Equity Investment Announces NTA Backing for May 2025
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Perpetual Equity Investment Co. Ltd. ( (AU:PIC) ) has shared an announcement.

Perpetual Equity Investment Company Limited announced its Net Tangible Asset (NTA) backing per share as of May 22, 2025, with figures standing at $1.241 before tax and $1.209 after tax. These figures, which are unaudited and approximate, reflect the provisions for deferred tax on unrealized gains and losses within the company’s investment portfolio, indicating the company’s current financial positioning and potential implications for stakeholders.

More about Perpetual Equity Investment Co. Ltd.

Perpetual Equity Investment Company Limited operates in the financial services industry, focusing on investment management. The company provides investment opportunities through its managed equity portfolio, aiming to deliver long-term capital growth and income by investing in a diversified portfolio of Australian and global equities.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Carbine Resources Announces Rights Issue to Fund Silica Sand Projects
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Carbine Resources Limited ( (AU:CRB) ) has provided an update.

Carbine Resources Limited has announced a pro-rata non-renounceable rights issue to raise approximately $1,103,476, offering 2 fully paid ordinary shares for every 3 shares held by eligible shareholders. The funds from this entitlement offer will be used for ongoing exploration and development activities at their Muchea West and Down South Silica Sand Projects, as well as for business development and general working capital. Additionally, the company plans to issue 10,000,000 options to Taylor Collison Limited as part of a broker offer.

More about Carbine Resources Limited

Carbine Resources Limited is involved in the mining industry, focusing on exploration and development projects. The company’s primary activities include the Muchea West and Down South Silica Sand Projects, where they are progressing with mining approvals and conducting field reconnaissance, sampling, and auger drilling.

Current Market Cap: A$1.66M

Learn more about CRB stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest update is out from Carbine Resources Limited ( (AU:CRB) ).

The latest announcement is out from RTG Mining ( (TSE:RTG) ).

RTG Mining Inc. successfully conducted its Annual General Meeting, where all proposed resolutions were approved by shareholders. Key resolutions included the appointment of BDO Audit Pty Ltd as auditors, ratification of share issues, and the election of directors, indicating strong shareholder support for the company’s strategic decisions and leadership.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:RTG is a Neutral.

RTG Mining’s overall score is weighed down by its financial struggles, including zero revenue generation and negative cash flows, posing significant risks. Technical analysis suggests some positive short-term momentum, but the stock’s valuation remains a concern due to lack of profitability.

Inmobiliaria del Sur ( (ES:ISUR) ) has shared an update.

data.title: Alleima and Danieli to Revolutionize DRI Production with Electric Heating Technology
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Alleima AB ( (SE:ALLEI) ) has issued an announcement.

Alleima’s Kanthal division, in collaboration with Danieli, is set to supply the first electric process gas heater for commercial use in Direct Reduced Iron (DRI) production at Emsteel’s plant in Abu Dhabi. This pilot project, based on Prothal® DH technology, aims to enhance energy efficiency and significantly reduce CO2 emissions, marking a crucial step towards emission-free ironmaking. The strategic partnership between Kanthal and Danieli, established in 2024, focuses on developing electric heating solutions for DRI plants, potentially transforming the industry by enabling retrofitting of existing plants and achieving substantial emission reductions.

More about Alleima AB

Alleima is a global manufacturer specializing in high value-added products in advanced stainless steels and special alloys, as well as industrial heating solutions. The company develops products for demanding applications across various industries, including energy, chemical, and aerospace, with offerings such as seamless steel tubes, precision strip steel, and ultra-fine wires. Alleima is headquartered in Sandviken, Sweden, employs around 6,500 people, and reported revenues of approximately 20 billion SEK in 2024.

Average Trading Volume: 414,195

Current Market Cap: SEK19.35B

For a thorough assessment of ALLEI stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
